name: Zip Codes - Top Zip Code Performance Analysis

content.query:
SELECT
cust.Zip
--,jobStatus.Description as JobStatus
,sum(job.GrossAmount) as [Total Gross Amount]
,count(job.JobID) as [Job Count]
,AVG(job.GrossAmount) as [Avg Gross Amount]
,DATEDIFF(month,min(ContractDate),max(ContractDate)) as [Months In Market]
,min(ContractDate) as [Min Contract Date]
,max(ContractDate) as [Max Contract Date]
 FROM 
 [EDW].[FACT_JOB] job
 ,[EDW].[DIM_JOB_STATUS] jobStatus
,[EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER] cust
WHERE
job.CustomerID = cust.CustomerID
and job.JobStatusID = jobStatus.JobStatusID
and cust.Zip in (
'75052',
'53704',
'53711',
'33023',
'53511',
'78660',
'33157',
'75002',
'75115',
'53590'
)
and job.ContractDate > '1900-01-01'
group by
cust.Zip
--,jobStatus.Description
order by [Total Gross Amount] desc
